title: Tilly Fletcher Television
description: Don’t look away. 24 hour telly. Washed down with six packs of flumps and a pint of sunny D. Come for a spin in the TV slop bucket, as we work out our childhoods and who to sue for damages. “Like a daytime tribute to Chris Morris’ Jam... reminded me of early Coogan in its studied exactness” Bobby Carroll, British Comedy Guide (for Turbo Town)

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex
